metadata.title: Felipe Sindeaux | Portfolio
metadata.description: Felipe Sindeaux is a full stack developer, simple, objective and modern

about.headingLine1: Fasten your seatbelt and get ready to
about.paragraph1: I'm Felipe, 25 years old and a Full Stack Developer with more than 3 years of experience on the development road. Just like a well-tuned car, I aim to deliver performance, style and precision in every project I build.
about.paragraph2: My passion for technology goes hand in hand with my enthusiasm for cars. Here, every line of code carries a bit of who I am, creative and always ready to accelerate toward new challenges.
about.paragraph3: This portfolio is my digital garage. Feel free to explore.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Some of the technologies I have worked with or studied

securityStart.label: Started the Information Security degree
securityStart.description: This is where I took my first steps into technology and had my first contact with basic programming. In the very first subjects, like algorithms and programming logic, I discovered my passion for the field and went looking for other courses to deepen my knowledge outside college.

fullstackStart.label: Started the Full Stack course
fullstackStart.description: After exploring content on my own, I decided to take a bigger step and enrolled in the professional course at Kenzie Academy. This experience was essential to consolidate my foundation and begin a complete journey into Full Stack development.

peerCoach.label: Started working as a Peer Coach
peerCoach.description: My performance stood out in the course and I had the opportunity to work as a Peer Coach, helping new students. This experience allowed me to improve my communication, leadership and mentoring skills, while reinforcing my technical knowledge by teaching.

fullstackEnd.label: Completed the Full Stack course
fullstackEnd.description: I finished the Full Stack course with solid experience in hands-on projects, ready to face the challenges of the market. The journey consolidated my command of several technologies and strengthened my confidence to work professionally.

umodeStart.label: Started working as a Full Stack Developer at uMode
umodeStart.description: At uMode I had my first professional opportunity, where I learned a lot and faced my biggest challenges, having the chance to work with several technologies on many solutions in the fashion market.

securityEnd.label: Completed the Information Security degree
securityEnd.description: I completed my degree in Information Security, broadening my knowledge in data protection, networks and cybersecurity practices. This foundation, combined with my development experience, made me a well-rounded professional, able to unite performance and security in digital solutions.
